design_philosophy.core_vibe: Tactical Command Center meets High-End Fintech
key_principles: Motion conveys status (pulsing = thinking, solid = idle)

usage.h1: font-heading font-black text-5xl tracking-widest uppercase text-white
usage.h3: font-subheading font-bold text-xl uppercase tracking-wider text-primary
usage.caption: font-mono text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest
usage.code: font-mono text-sm text-green-400 bg-black/50 p-2 rounded-sm border border-white/5

visual_enhancers.scanlines: background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0), rgba(255,255,255,0) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); background-size: 100% 4px;

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4A017] text-black font-subheading font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#F0B020] transition-all duration-200 sharp-corners
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-subheading uppercase hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white/40 transition-all

cards.default: bg-[#101010] border border-white/5 p-6 hover:border-[#D4A017]/30 transition-colors duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#D4A017] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4A017] placeholder:text-gray-700 font-mono text-sm h-12

badges.status_online: bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 border border-green-500/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 uppercase
badges.status_busy: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/20 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 uppercase animate-pulse
badges.status_offline: bg-gray-800 text-gray-500 border border-gray-700 font-mono text-xs px-2 py-0.5 uppercase

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Install 'framer-motion' if not present (yarn add framer-motion) for complex transitions.
Use the provided image URLs. DO NOT leave src='' empty.
Implement the 'Scanline' effect as a global overlay in App.js or main layout.
Force Dark Mode: Add 'dark' class to the html/body tag by default.
The primary gold color is #D4A017. Use it for Primary Buttons, Active States, and Key Data Points.
Avoid rounded-full for buttons unless it's a specific 'pill' style. Prefer rounded-sm for the military/tech look.
